runtime_optimization.name: ollama-q4-kv-cache
runtime_optimization.note: This is q4 KV-cache quantization exposed by Ollama/llama.cpp, not true Google TurboQuant. True TurboQuant requires backend-level KV-cache kernels with rotation, scalar Lloyd-Max/PolarQuant quantization, and QJL residual correction; that is not exposed by the bundled stripped Ollama runtime.

tools.name: calculator
tools.use_when: Exact arithmetic, percentages, totals, averages, rates, differences, comparisons, and multi-step numeric word problems.

tools.name: search
tools.use_when: Latest/current/official facts, prices, schedules, versions, news, documentation, or prompts that explicitly ask to search or verify online.

tools.name: fireworks_chat
tools.use_when: Rubric marks a prompt high risk for local Gemma, such as strict summary, rich NER, hard logic, or unseen code/debugging.

routing.note: Fireworks is used only for rubric-high-risk prompts; local model/tool paths remain the default.
